next_steps: Send stool or serum for Clostridium botulinum toxin and culture
Perform repetitive nerve stimulation and electromyography
Contact public health department for potential administration of Botulism Immune Globulin (BabyBIG)
Consult neurology and infectious disease specialists
Maintain respiratory support and monitor for autonomic instability
Review history for exposure to honey or environmental dust
Send stool for Clostridium botulinum toxin and culture
Perform repetitive nerve stimulation (RNS) and electromyography (EMG)
Contact state department of public health to obtain Botulism Immune Globulin (BabyBIG)
Consult pediatric neurology and pediatric infectious disease specialists
Perform thorough physical exam for a tick or associated lesions
Consider repeat MRI of the spine with contrast to evaluate for occult inflammatory cord processes
Continue supportive care including mechanical ventilation and close monitoring for autonomic instability
